description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a vertically striped short-sleeve jersey with a V-neck, featuring a number and text on the back. He wears fitted cargo-style pants with visible pocket flaps and white low-top sneakers. His hair is styled in a high ponytail, and he has a beard and mustache. The figure's build is athletic, and his arms are relaxed at his sides. The overall appearance suggests a casual, sporty look suitable for urban environments.
description: Athletic adult male in a striped jersey, cargo pants, and sneakers with a high ponytail and beard, exuding a sporty, casual urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped jersey, V-neck, facial hair, and relaxed arm posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail, profile of the face, and the fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Back view displays the number and text on the jersey, ponytail, and rear pocket details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ponytail and side profile, with visible pant details.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve athletic jersey and fitted cargo pants
attribute_hairstyle: long hair tied in a high ponytail
